```{r rf-prep-estadio}
df_rf_est          <- df_est
df_rf_est_original <- df_est
df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin <- factor(df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin,
                                          levels = c("III","IV"))
cat("Observaciones originales:", nrow(df_rf_est_original), "\n")
table(df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin)
```

### Balanceo de clases con ROSE

```{r rf-rose-estadio}
set.seed(199)
df_rf_est_rose <- ROSE(estadio_bin ~ ., data = df_rf_est_original,
                        N = 20, p = 0.5,
                        hmult.majo = 0.5, hmult.mino = 0.5)$data

# Ninguna variable numérica puede ser negativa
vars_num_rose <- names(df_rf_est_rose)[sapply(df_rf_est_rose, is.numeric)]
df_rf_est_rose[vars_num_rose] <- lapply(df_rf_est_rose[vars_num_rose], function(x) pmax(x, 0))

df_rf_est_rose$estadio_bin <- factor(df_rf_est_rose$estadio_bin, levels = c("III","IV"))
cat("Distribución ROSE:\n")
table(df_rf_est_rose$estadio_bin)
```

### LOOCV

```{r rf-loocv-estadio}
# Función métricas
metricas_bin_est <- function(obs, pred) {
  lvls <- c("III","IV")
  cm   <- table(factor(obs, levels=lvls), factor(pred, levels=lvls))
  TP <- cm["IV","IV"];  FN <- cm["IV","III"]
  TN <- cm["III","III"]; FP <- cm["III","IV"]
  TPR <- if ((TP+FN)>0) TP/(TP+FN) else NA
  TNR <- if ((TN+FP)>0) TN/(TN+FP) else NA
  BA  <- if (!is.na(TPR) && !is.na(TNR)) (TPR+TNR)/2 else NA
  list(TPR=TPR, TNR=TNR, BA=BA, cm=cm)
}

ntree_vals_est  <- c(25, 50, 75)
mtry_vals_est   <- c(3, 5)
nodesize_rf_est <- 3
n_orig_rf_est   <- nrow(df_rf_est_original)
n_rose_rf_est   <- nrow(df_rf_est_rose)
resultados_rf_est <- list()

set.seed(123)
for (nt in ntree_vals_est) {
  for (mt in mtry_vals_est) {
    mt_safe <- min(mt, ncol(df_rf_est_rose) - 1)
    probs_t <- numeric(n_orig_rf_est)
    pred_t  <- character(n_orig_rf_est)
    for (i in seq_len(n_orig_rf_est)) {
      idx_train <- if (i <= n_rose_rf_est) -i else seq_len(n_rose_rf_est)
      train <- df_rf_est_rose[idx_train, ]
      test  <- df_rf_est_original[i, , drop = FALSE]
      if (length(unique(train$estadio_bin)) < 2) {
        pred_t[i] <- NA; probs_t[i] <- NA; next
      }
      mod_i <- tryCatch(
        randomForest(estadio_bin ~ ., data = train,
                     ntree = nt, mtry = mt_safe,
                     nodesize = nodesize_rf_est, importance = FALSE),
        error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(mod_i)) { pred_t[i] <- NA; probs_t[i] <- NA; next }
      pred_t[i]  <- as.character(predict(mod_i, test, type = "class"))
      probs_t[i] <- predict(mod_i, test, type = "prob")[, "IV"]
    }
    obs_t <- as.character(df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin)
    m     <- metricas_bin_est(obs_t, pred_t)
    key   <- paste0("ntree", nt, "_mtry", mt)
    resultados_rf_est[[key]] <- list(
      ntree    = nt, mtry     = mt,
      BA       = m$BA, TPR    = m$TPR, TNR      = m$TNR,
      accuracy = mean(pred_t == obs_t, na.rm = TRUE),
      probs    = probs_t, pred = pred_t, cm       = m$cm
    )
  }
}
```
### Resultados Random Forest
```{r rf-resultados-estadio}
# Tabla comparativa
tabla_rf_est_comp <- data.frame(
  ntree        = sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "ntree"),
  mtry         = sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "mtry"),
  Accuracy     = round(sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "accuracy"), 3),
  Balanced_Acc = round(sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "BA"), 3),
  TPR_Sensib   = round(sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "TPR"), 3),
  TNR_Especif  = round(sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "TNR"), 3)
)
kable(tabla_rf_est_comp,
      caption = "Comparación de combinaciones Random Forest — estadio III vs IV",
      align = c("c","c","c","c","c","c")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(1:2, bold = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#2C3E50", color = "white")

# Mejor combinación
best_rf_est_idx <- which.max(sapply(resultados_rf_est, `[[`, "BA"))
best_rf_est     <- resultados_rf_est[[best_rf_est_idx]]

cat("Random Forest Estadio — Mejor combinación\n")
cat("ntree =", best_rf_est$ntree, "| mtry =", best_rf_est$mtry,
    "| nodesize =", nodesize_rf_est, "\n")
cat("Balanced Accuracy:", round(best_rf_est$BA,  3),
    "| TPR:", round(best_rf_est$TPR, 3),
    "| TNR:", round(best_rf_est$TNR, 3), "\n")

# Tabla comparativa final
pred_rf_est     <- best_rf_est$pred
probs_rf_est    <- best_rf_est$probs
obs_rf_est      <- as.character(df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin)
accuracy_rf_est <- best_rf_est$accuracy
BA_rf_est       <- best_rf_est$BA
TPR_rf_est      <- best_rf_est$TPR
TNR_rf_est      <- best_rf_est$TNR

auc_rf_est <- tryCatch(
  pROC::roc(df_rf_est_original$estadio_bin, probs_rf_est,
            quiet = TRUE, levels = c("III","IV"), direction = "<"),
  error = function(e) NULL)
auc_rf_est_val <- if (!is.null(auc_rf_est)) round(as.numeric(auc_rf_est$auc), 3) else NA

# Matriz de confusión
as.data.frame.matrix(best_rf_est$cm) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Observado") %>%
  kable(caption = "Matriz de confusión LOOCV — Random Forest estadio (mejor combinación)",
        align = "c") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#2C3E50", color = "white")

# Curva ROC
if (!is.null(auc_rf_est))
  plot(auc_rf_est, main = paste0("Curva ROC — Random Forest para el estadio tumoral | AUC = ", auc_rf_est_val))

# Tabla métricas
data.frame(
  Métrica = c("Accuracy","Balanced Accuracy","Sensibilidad","Especificidad","AUC"),
  Valor   = c(accuracy_rf_est, BA_rf_est, TPR_rf_est, TNR_rf_est, auc_rf_est_val)
) %>%
  kable(caption = "Rendimiento LOOCV — Random Forest (estadio III vs IV)",
        align = c("l","c")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#2C3E50", color = "white") %>%
  row_spec(2, bold = TRUE, background = "#D6EAF8")
```

### Importancia de variables

```{r rf-importancia-estadio}
if (length(unique(df_rf_est_rose$estadio_bin)) >= 2) {
  mt_safe_est_full   <- min(best_rf_est$mtry, ncol(df_rf_est_rose) - 1)
  modelo_rf_est_full <- randomForest(estadio_bin ~ ., data = df_rf_est_rose,
                                      ntree     = best_rf_est$ntree,
                                      mtry      = mt_safe_est_full,
                                      nodesize  = nodesize_rf_est,
                                      importance = TRUE)
  imp_est_df <- data.frame(
    Variable         = rownames(importance(modelo_rf_est_full)),
    MeanDecreaseGini = round(importance(modelo_rf_est_full)[,"MeanDecreaseGini"], 3)
  ) %>% arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseGini))

  cat("\nImportancia de variables:\n")
  print(imp_est_df, row.names = FALSE)

  varImpPlot(modelo_rf_est_full,
             main = paste0("Importancia de variables Random Forest para el estadio tumoral"))
}
```

***
